ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "eattype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of restaurant (e.g., coffee shop, fine dining) */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the restaurant is located (e.g., city centre, riverside) */,
  "customerrating" REAL /* Customer rating of the restaurant (out of 5) */,
  "nearby_landmark" TEXT /* Nearby landmark or point of interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant entry was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine type of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the restaurant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the restaurant */,
  "smoking_area" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has a smoking area */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is wheelchair accessible */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last health inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_eattype_id FOREIGN KEY ("eattype_id") REFERENCES eattypes ("eattype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., city centre, riverside) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eattypes" (
  "eattype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eattype */,
  "eattype_name" TEXT /* Name of the eattype (e.g., coffee shop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the eattype */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of dining at this type of restaurant */,
  "average_dining_time" TEXT /* Average time spent dining at this type of restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eattype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_rating_food" INTEGER /* Rating for the food */,
  "review_rating_service" INTEGER /* Rating for the service */,
  "review_rating_ambiance" INTEGER /* Rating for the ambiance */,
  "review_rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "review_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who wrote the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended restaurant */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., friend, system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was created */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., accepted, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time of the booking */,
  "booking_notes" TEXT /* Special notes or requests for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently available */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "item_ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients */,
  "item_allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens */,
  "item_nutritional_info" TEXT /* Nutritional information */,
  "item_availability_start" TEXT /* Start time of item availability */,
  "item_availability_end" TEXT /* End time of item availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item ordered */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Special notes or requests for the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the order payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
